title: tui-translator QA8-09 Fixture Manifest Schema v1
description: Machine-readable contract for deterministic cross-platform audio/provider simulation fixtures consumed by the QA8-09 sim-harness parity tests and the QA8-05 soak runner v2. The manifest is the single source of truth for the on-disk fixtures (path, sha256, format, total_samples, duration) and the determinism budgets the harness MUST hold. Schema v1 is the QA8-09 baseline; subsequent revisions MUST bump `schema_version`. The manifest is strictly additive over QA8-03's `audio_fixture` field and is referenced by QA8-07 telemetry consumers (issue #503 / QA8-05) via the `related_issues` array so the same artefact can be linked from soak evidence without re-validating the underlying WAV.

schema_version.description: Fixture-manifest schema version. v1 is the QA8-09 baseline; subsequent revisions MUST bump this string.

related_issues.description: GitHub issues this manifest is evidence for. Always contains '#507' for QA8-09; consumers (QA8-05 / #503, QA8-07 / #505) may be listed here so the manifest doubles as the cross-link between sim parity and live soak.

fixtures.description: Ordered list of on-disk fixtures the deterministic simulation harness depends on. Every fixture is byte-pinned via `sha256` so cross-platform CI runs can detect drift without re-decoding the WAV.

notes.description: Free-form human-readable notes (ADR pointer, generator script, etc.).

path.description: Repo-relative POSIX path (forward slashes) to the fixture.

kind.description: Fixture kind. v1 only defines the 16-bit signed little-endian PCM WAV kind used by the soak runner; future revisions may add OGG/FLAC.

sha256.description: Lower-case hex SHA-256 of the entire file on disk.

byte_size.description: Size of the file in bytes.

segments.description: Optional per-segment annotations matching `tests/soak/gen_fixture.py`. Each segment is a half-open [start_sample, end_sample) range with a label.

generator.description: Optional repo-relative path to the generator script.

determinism_budget.description: Determinism / performance guarantees the QA8-09 parity tests enforce on every CI run. QA8-05 (#503) reads these so PR-tier soak runs do not regress the sim harness.

min_identical_runs.description: Replayer + scripted-feeder must yield byte-identical traces across at least this many independent runs over the same seed.

sim_events_target.description: Target event count the synthetic 1M-event simulator must process within `sim_events_max_wall_seconds`.

sim_events_max_wall_seconds.description: Wall-clock ceiling for the 1M-event simulator run on PR-tier CI hardware.

long_replay_drift_max_ms.description: Maximum allowed sample-clock drift, in milliseconds, when the WAV fixture is looped for long replays (planner target: 100ms).

platforms.description: Per-OS loopback / fixture-source strategy. The same WAV fixture is the byte-pinned input on every platform; the production capture path is documented here for the QA8-09 ADR cross-reference.

fixture_id.description: ID of the fixture (from `fixtures[].id`) used as the deterministic audio source on this platform.

loopback_path.description: Human-readable description of the production capture path this platform uses outside of sim (e.g. 'WASAPI loopback', 'CoreAudio + ScreenCaptureKit', 'PipeWire').

adr.description: Repo-relative path to the ADR that owns the licensing/TCC/permission decision for this platform.
